MIA.headline: NBA Power Rankings: Did your team meet or miss its season expectations?
MIA.description: The last NBA power rankings of the regular season! Let's see where all 30 teams stack up before the postseason.

MIA.headline: Miami faces Toronto, aims to break road slide
MIA.description: Miami Heat (41-38, 10th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Toronto Raptors (44-35, sixth in the Eastern Conference)

MIA.headline: Heat fall to Raptors, head to play-in tournament for 4th time
MIA.description: If the Miami Heat are going to find their way back to the NBA playoffs, they'll have to survive the play-in tournament.

MIA.headline: Miami Heat vs. Toronto Raptors: Game Highlights
MIA.description: Miami Heat vs. Toronto Raptors: Game Highlights

MIA.headline: Raptors roll past Heat 121-95, an outcome that locks Miami into the play-in tournament
MIA.description: — Scottie Barnes scored 25 points, Brandon Ingram finished with 23 and the Toronto Raptors beat Miami 121-95 on Tuesday night, an outcome that locked the Heat into the play-in tournament for a fourth consecutive season.
